raw_text: personal information first name and surname: andrei-iuliu maniu date and place of birth: may, 26th 1991 in cugir (romania) nationality: romanian marital status: single address: c/ cea bermúdez 61 (28003, madrid) phone number: +34 622014892 / +34 915433171 / +39 388 951 4537 e-mail: andreimaniu26@gmail.com driving license: type b education 1997-2009 elementary, middle and high school education. at jesus maestro school in madrid. 2009-2014 aeronautical engineer (5 years). e.t.s de ingenieros aeronáuticos (universidad politécnica de madrid). intensification: aircraft. all courses passed, only remains the final project. expected to finish on october 2014. 2013-2014 erasmus exchange programme. fifth year of aeronautical engineering at universita degli studi di roma la sapienza (italy). employment experience 2008-2012 private lessons. i have given private lessons to high school students of mathematics, physics and chemistry. 2012-2013 intership. in the physics and chemistry department at e.u.i.t aeronáuticos (universidad politécnica de madrid). i created and wrote up exercises /practices for students (one academic year). computer skills advanced knowledge of windows and macintosh operative systems. mastery of microsoft office. intermediate knowledge of the next computer software: catia v5.0, autocad, nastran-patran. basic knowledge of matlab. andrei-luliu maniu 1 july 2014 languages spanish and romanian: mother languages. english: advanced level. italian: advanced level. french: basic level. other information voluntary work at nio jesús hospital with the international ong save the children. between my hobbies stand out sports (football, basketball, athletics and ping- pong), cooking and doing puzzles. andrei-luliu maniu 2 july 2014
